description: Deny-by-default baseline for the frameless quick-capture window (HLD §8.2): command invocation, the AppEvent channel, and self-hide only. The window is pre-created hidden and toggled Rust-side by the tray/global hotkey; `core:window:allow-hide` lets its WebView dismiss itself on submit/Escape (hide, never close, so it stays reusable). The global shortcut is registered Rust-side, so no `global-shortcut` JS permission is granted here. Feature permissions are added explicitly as the corresponding HLD §6 commands land — never broadly. See Architecture §9/§12.
